w:r.w:t: I cannot directly edit or append text to your existing Google Drive files (like your "productivity" document) for security and privacy reasons.
However, I have formatted the entire rigorous system below into a clean, copy-pasteable
and paste it directly into your "productivity" Google Doc.
button (at the bottom of this response) to save this as a
Google Sheets (One file, 5 Tabs: Habits, Job Hunt, WGU Degree, Fitness, Coding) [3]
Use this prompt in Gemini to generate the structure for your Master Hub:

"I need to build a highly structured, rigid tracking system for 5 areas of my life: personal habits, job hunting, a Western Governors University (WGU) degree, physical fitness, and personal coding projects. Act as a systems architect. For each of these 5 areas, define: 1) One overarching Objective, 2) Three specific, measurable Key Results (OKRs), and 3) A standardized weekly template of tasks required to hit those metrics. Format the output clearly so I can copy it into a spreadsheet tracker."
Google Tasks (App & Watch), Google Calendar, Gemini Live [5, 6]
Create 5 separate lists in Google Tasks matching your Sheet tabs (e.g., "WGU Study", "Job Search").
Add the Google Tasks complication to your Pixel Watch face for wrist-based check-offs.
Activate Gemini Live on Pixel Phone.
"Look at my Google Calendar and my Google Tasks for tomorrow. Help me time-block 2 hours for my WGU degree and 1 hour for my coding project around my existing schedule."
Google Sheets (Columns: Company, Role, Date Applied, Status).
Paste job descriptions into Google Docs.
"Tailor my master resume to this job description, highlighting my analytical and project management skills. Highlight the exact keywords I need to change." [7]
Use it as an AI tutor to generate flashcards, summaries, and practice quizzes. [8]
"Write clear documentation for this code block and map out the standard file structure for a [Language] project." [2, 9]
"Create a 4-day structural hypertrophy workout split that I can complete in 45 minutes, focusing on progressive overload." [10]

"This week I completed [X] out of [Y] WGU study blocks, applied to [X] jobs, and finished [Project Task], but I missed [X] workout days. Analyze this data. What bottleneck is causing me to miss workouts, and how can I adjust my Google Calendar blocks for next week to enforce better discipline?"
Now that you have the system, would you like to
right now, so you can paste them into your Master Sheet immediately?
